title: 準2級 模擬テスト6 読解 1
prompt:
次の英文の内容に関して、質問に対する答えとして最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。

Question: When do residents in Seattle gather to enjoy the travel planning?
[Mock 6-1]
passage: Recently, travel planning has become very popular in Seattle. Since 2011, many residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 217 more events related to travel planning.

title: 準2級 模擬テスト6 長文空所補充 1
prompt:
次の英文の（　　　）に入れるのに最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。
[Mock 6-1]
passage: In 2011, I participated in a travel planning in Seattle. It was a great experience. I met about 217 people who were interested in the same things. However, there was one (      ). We didn't have enough time to discuss everything.

prompt:

[Mock 6-1]
choices: 与えられたテーマに沿った、適切な構成と内容の解答
テーマから外れた無関係な解答
文法やスペルミスが多数ある解答
単語数が不足している不十分な解答
explanation: pre2-06-writing_email-01: Eメールの問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。
